title: Lead Investment Banker at Care Ratings

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Care Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
